title: Shaggy Savory Tunisian Cheese Flatbread
description: A fermented, shaggy, nostalgic Tunisian dish featuring colby jack cheese, this flatbread is perfect for a snack or light meal. It is egg-free-friendly and made with a simple dough.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add olive oil and water to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a thin circle.
Sprinkle shredded colby jack cheese over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the dough over the cheese to form a crust.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until it is golden brown.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
